summary: Comprehensive testing of Partners and Inspection Templates management system. All 16 features tested and verified working. Backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features functional).
critical_code_review_comments: All Partners and Inspection Templates features implemented correctly
Backend APIs properly handle CRUD operations, toggle status, and set default
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Stats cards update correctly when data changes
Modal forms have all required fields with proper validation
Toast notifications provide clear feedback for all actions
seed_data_creation: Created ICICI Bank partner and ICICI Bank Vehicle Inspection template during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partners and Inspection Templates features fully tested. Existing data: 3 partners (B2C Default, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank - inactive), 5 templates (B2C Default Inspection, ICICI Bank Vehicle Inspection - default, New test template for MFCWL, TEST_Template_Updated_2c49, TEST_Template_Updated_d50a). All CRUD operations, toggle, and set default functionality working.

features_tested.Services_Tab_Navigation: PASS - Services tab shows 6 sub-tabs: Packages, Categories, Offers, Inspection Q&A, Partners, Inspection Templates
features_tested.Partners_Tab_Stats: PASS - Shows Total Partners, Active, B2C, B2B Partners stat cards
features_tested.Partners_Modal_Fields: PASS - Modal has Name, Type dropdown (B2C/Bank/Insurance/B2B), Contact Person, Contact Phone, Contact Email, Address, Notes, Active toggle
features_tested.Partners_Create_Bank: PASS - Created ICICI Bank partner successfully with toast notification
features_tested.Partners_Card_Display: PASS - Partner cards show type icon, name, contact info
features_tested.Partners_Edit: PASS - Edit modal opens with pre-filled data, Update Partner button works
features_tested.Partners_Toggle_Status: PASS - Toggle button deactivates/activates partner with toast notification
features_tested.Templates_Tab_Stats: PASS - Shows Total Templates, Active, Questions Pool, Partners stat cards
features_tested.Templates_Modal_Section1: PASS - Section 1 has Template Name, Partner/Client dropdown, Report Template dropdown, Description
features_tested.Templates_Modal_Section2: PASS - Section 2 shows categories with checkboxes, question counts, Select All button
features_tested.Templates_Category_Expand: PASS - Categories expand to show individual questions with answer type badges
features_tested.Templates_Create: PASS - Created ICICI Bank Vehicle Inspection template with 4 questions
features_tested.Templates_Card_Display: PASS - Template cards show name, partner, question count, default/custom report badge
features_tested.Templates_Set_Default: PASS - Set as Default button works, shows Default badge on template card
features_tested.Templates_Edit: PASS - Edit modal opens with pre-filled data including selected questions
